retrieved_result: Q: Smart Card Reader does not work after installation of Windows 10 ST Steve Weeks21 asked on October 14, 2015Q: Smart Card Reader does not work after installation of Windows 10I have Belkin F1DNOO5U Smart Card and it will not work after installation of Windows 10. Can anybody help me with a fix? Thank you for the help. Reply I have the same question (40)Replies (2)
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses a hardware/driver issue with a Smart Card Reader on Windows 10, not any API integration debugging. It is unrelated to the query about debugging API integration.
